basic_details.short_information: ICAR - Central Rice Research Institute (ICAR-CRRI) Young Professional-I (YP-I) Notification 2026 has been released through Advt No. 06/YP-I/2026-27 on the official website of ICAR-CRRI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICAR-CRRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR-CRRI Young Professional-I posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Young Professional-I posts at ICAR-CRRI is scheduled for 05 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional-I post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Young Professional-I position is a B.Sc. degree in Agriculture, Horticulture, or Forestry.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional-I position?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates applying for the Young Professional-I post is between 21 years and 45 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-I post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Young Professional-I post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Young Professional-I post at ICAR-CRRI.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is a Walk-in Interview. Interested candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the ICAR-CRRI Young Professional-I recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Young Professional-I post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Young Professional-I post will involve a Written-cum-personal interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the ICAR-CRRI located?
faq.answer: ICAR-CRRI is located in Cuttack, Odisha, with the pincode 753006.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant documents as specified in the notification.
